---
title: "Primary Analysis"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(survminer)
library(survival)
```

```{r}
df <- read.xlsx("/Users/austinra/BIOS6624/Project 3/Data Processed/survival_df.xlsx")

#Change to factor
df$SEX <- factor(df$SEX)
df$DIABETES <- factor(df$DIABETES)
df$BPMEDS <- factor(df$BPMEDS)
df$CURSMOKE <- factor(df$CURSMOKE)

#Remove missing baseline values
df <- df %>% filter(complete.cases(BPMEDS, TOTCHOL, BMI))
```

#Preliminary Visualizations
```{r}
surv <- survfit(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE)~SEX, data = df)
ggsurvplot(surv, censor = F)
ggsurvplot(surv, censor = F, fun= "cloglog")
```

Separate male and female data for analysis
```{r}
male_df <- filter(df, SEX ==1)
female_df <- filter(df, SEX ==2)
```


```{r}
full_male_mod <- coxph(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE) ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI, 
                    data = male_df)

# Run backwards selection
reduced_male_mod <- step(full_male_mod,
                         scope = list(
                           lower = ~ AGE + DIABETES + SYSBP,
                           upper = ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI 
                           ),
                         direction = "backward")

summary(reduced_male_mod)
```

```{r}
full_female_mod <- coxph(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE) ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI, 
                    data = female_df)

# Run backwards selection
reduced_female_mod <- step(full_female_mod,
                           scope = list(
                           lower = ~ AGE + DIABETES + SYSBP,
                           upper = ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI 
                           ),
                           direction = "backward")

summary(reduced_female_mod)
```
